propositions: A static policy table resolves attestation kind to scheme, namespace, and trust_root rather than reading the scheme from the envelope.
verify(kind, envelope, trust_root) dispatches on the policy-pinned scheme so records with tampered in-band scheme/keyid still verify under the pinned scheme.
Unknown or mismatched scheme for a kind must fail closed.
The policy is a source-pinned hardcoded module-level dict, not loaded from config or environment, which is the intended security property.
Schemes register into a module dict via register_scheme(), while trust material is caller-supplied per-scheme and treated as a deployment concern.
A corrupt-signature verify-failure test is included via a fake scheme.
